headline: Telecom Tower Sharing Saves Industry RM2.4 Billion Annually
context: Malaysia mandatory tower sharing policy saved telecom industry RM2.4 billion by preventing duplicate construction in 2025.

cards.big: Tower sharing saved telecom industry RM2.4 billion in duplication
cards.sub: DNB and edotco manage shared infrastructure for all major operators

cards.big: edotco operates 42,000 shared towers serving 4 operators simultaneously
cards.sub: Sharing reduced need for 28,000 additional towers built independently

cards.big: Rental rates of RM2,800 monthly per operator 35% below regional average
cards.sub: Cost savings expected to flow to consumers through lower pricing

cards.big: Rural tower deployment increased 22% under sharing versus projected 8%
cards.sub: Shared economics make previously unviable rural locations feasible

cards.big: Tower sharing tests whether infrastructure cooperation produces consumer benefit or just industry savings
RM2.4 billion saved through telecom tower sharing. Infrastructure sharing reduces cost without reducing competition.
